description_long: This armchair features a striking glossy green upholstery with a high, winged backrest and deep button tufting accented by light blue buttons. The back of the chair is adorned with bold black vertical stripes, adding a dramatic visual contrast. The seat and backrest are generously padded, providing a plush and inviting appearance. The armrests are integrated into the sides, rising smoothly from the seat to the top of the backrest without any distinct separation. The chair stands on four short, dark wooden legs, which are slightly tapered and provide sturdy support. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, making it suitable for contemporary urban environments such as stylish cafes, boutique lobbies, or public lounges.
description: A glossy green, high-backed armchair with black stripes, blue tufted buttons, and short dark wooden legs. Its bold, modern design features integrated armrests and plush padding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high, winged backrest, blue button tufting, and integrated armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the chair's depth, smooth armrest integration, and glossy finish.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the bold black vertical stripes on the green backrest and the two rear legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the chair's profile, padding, and leg design.
attribute_armrest_design: integrated, padded and upholstered, no distinct separation
attribute_backrest_style: high and winged, tufted with blue buttons, bold black stripes on rear
attribute_upholstery_pattern: glossy green with tufted buttons and black vertical stripes
